chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

entities_post_resolution.name: Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: An Order is a formal transaction document recording a customer's purchase, including details such as line items, payment status, and shipment information.
synonyms: at least one Order Line Item
one or more Order Line Items
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Cannot be shipped until payment is confirmed | - Can only be cancelled if not yet shipped | - Status changes are logged for audit purposes | - References exactly one Sales Order | A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | - A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | A Sales Order has one or more Payments | A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | - Must place at least one order to remain active | - Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | - Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | Customers are the primary actors in the

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master(Cust Id)
entities_post_resolution.definition: The CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) is a data entity representing the unique identifier for customers within the customer master data set.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Line 1
entities_post_resolution.definition: An entity representing different types of electronic accessories or peripherals purchased separately.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | - Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50

entities_post_resolution.name: Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform, organized into categories and tracked across inventory.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Definition**: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform. | They are organized into categories and have inventory tracked across warehouses. | - Must belong to a valid category before being sold | - Prices can change daily based on market conditions | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Return Policy: The set of rules and conditions under which customers can return products and receive refunds.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment #S 001
entities_post_resolution.definition: A shipment is a batch of goods sent from a seller to a buyer, identified by a unique shipment number.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Shipment #S-001 containing 2 items from Warehouse WH-EU-01 | - Shipment #S-002 with tracking number "1Z999AA1" for Order #12347

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Product.Product Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID is a unique identifier for a product within the TB_PRODUCT entity in the business data model.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | - PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Price
entities_post_resolution.definition: The unit price at the time of purchase is the cost per individual item or unit agreed upon at the moment the transaction occurs.
synonyms: a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase
the price at the moment of ordering
unit price at time of order
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | - Quantity of units ordered | - Extended amount = quantity × unit price | Each captures the price at the moment of ordering. | - Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Cancellation
entities_post_resolution.definition: Order Cancellation is the process of voiding a customer's order before it has been shipped, often involving a refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled. | - Can only be cancelled if not yet shipped

entities_post_resolution.name: €156.48 For Order #12345
entities_post_resolution.definition: A payment transaction represents a financial transfer made by a customer via a specific payment method for an order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Credit card payment of €156.48 for Order #12345 | - PayPal payment of €45.00 for Order #12346

entities_post_resolution.name: Usb Cable
entities_post_resolution.definition: - Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50

entities_post_resolution.definition: - Shipment #S-001 containing 2 items from Warehouse WH-EU-01

entities_post_resolution.definition: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

entities_post_resolution.definition: **Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products.

entities_post_resolution.definition: **Definition**: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Definition**: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform.

entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier

entities_post_resolution.definition: - Must belong to a valid category before being sold

entities_post_resolution.definition: - Must place at least one order to remain active

entities_post_resolution.definition: - Prices can change daily based on market conditions

entities_post_resolution.definition: - Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates

entities_post_resolution.name: Inventory Tracked Across Warehouses
entities_post_resolution.definition: They are organized into categories and have inventory tracked across warehouses.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: They are organized into categories and have inventory tracked across warehouses.

entities_post_resolution.definition: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. | **Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases.

entities_post_resolution.definition: - Cannot be shipped until payment is confirmed

entities_post_resolution.definition: Orders are created when customers complete checkout. They track the customer, items, payment status, and delivery information.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Orders are created when customers complete checkout. They track the customer, items, payment status, and delivery information.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: This table stores core information about customers, including their contact details, regional classification, account creation date, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about products available in the inventory, including identifiers, names, categories, pricing, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about product categories and their hierarchical relationships.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: This table stores header information for sales orders, including order details, status, payment confirmation, and delivery timestamps.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about each product line item within customer orders, including quantities, prices, and total amounts.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: This table stores records of payments made for sales orders, including payment details, status, and timestamps.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about shipments, including shipment identifiers, associated order references, warehouse locations, shipment dates, tracking details, and current shipment status.
